summary: Backend-only testing for ArtisanWeb SaaS. Wrote pytest suite with 28 tests covering health, auth (register/login/me + 401/400 cases), site generation with Claude (no-image fast path + 1 real Gemini image), sites CRUD, publish, public site (no auth + user_id stripped), lead submission, owner-only leads listing, multi-tenant isolation (user B blocked from get/update/publish/delete/leads of user A), slug uniqueness on duplicate business+city, and delete cascades to leads. ALL 28 TESTS PASSED in ~78s.

minor.issue: Other-user access returns 404 (intentional info-hiding) — acceptable but consider 403 for clarity in API docs.
No password complexity rules beyond min_length=6; OK for MVP but flag for production.
When generate_image=true and Gemini fails, hero_image_url silently becomes null with no warning to client. Consider returning a flag like image_generation_failed.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: load_dotenv path is fine, but JWT_SECRET defaults to 'dev-secret' — ensure prod env always sets it (currently set in .env).

server.py update_site: SiteUpdate.model_dump() with v is not None correctly skips unset fields; good. But content is replaced wholesale (no deep-merge) — main agent may want partial-merge for content fields if frontend sends partial content.
server.py generate_site: AI failures fall back to _fallback_content silently. Add logging visibility or a `generation_method` field (claude|fallback) to help debug in production.

server.py: Gemini image returned as base64 data URL inline in the document; large payloads stored in MongoDB will inflate document size and slow list/get queries. Consider storing under /uploads or external object storage and returning a URL.
server.py public_site: pops user_id but the document still contains internal fields like 'status' (visible) — fine for MVP. No leak of password_hash since it's a different collection.
Auth: bcrypt + JWT 30-day expiry — acceptable for MVP. No refresh token, no logout/blacklist — known MVP scope.
test_credentials: Dynamically generated per run with TEST_ prefix; password testpass123
seed_data_creation: Suite creates 2 users + up to 3 sites and cleans them up at the end (TestZDelete). No leftover data expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_artisanweb.py is the regression set. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported from /app/frontend/.env. Tests are session-scoped to avoid hammering Claude/Gemini; only ONE Claude call (TestSitesGenerate.test_generate_site_no_image) + ONE Gemini call (test_generate_with_image) + slug uniqueness creates 2 more no-image sites (Claude only). Total ~75-90s including real LLM. Frontend was not tested (per request). For frontend testing later, the public site at /api/public/sites/{slug} returns full content payload ready for SSR or React rendering.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All endpoints behave per spec including French content (ville présente dans hero_title/hero_subtitle/seo_description), slug uniqueness collision-handling via incrementing suffix, cascade delete of leads on site deletion, and JWT-based isolation.
